name: Fruit Sponge
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water.
2. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
3. Combine dissolved gelatin, sour milk, sugar, lemon juice, and salt in a bowl. Mix thoroughly.
4. Cool mixture until it is partially set.
5. Beat the mixture until it becomes light and fluffy.
6. Add vanilla flavoring and crushed fruit to the mixture. Fold gently until combined.
7. Whisk stiffly beaten egg white into the mixture until the gelatin holds its shape.
8. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for about 1 hour or until set.
9. Pile lightly into a serving dish.
10. Serve with whipped cream or soft custard. Makes 8 servings.
Mrs. Martin Sorenson, Tabor, S.D.
